scored_papers.title: A collider as a quantum computer
scored_papers.abstract: Scattering processes are inherently quantum mechanical. We reformulate scattering at the level of the process itself by representing helicity transition matrices as quantum circuits.
scored_papers.reason: 🎯 collider 散乱を helicity 遷移の量子回路として再定式化!S 行列を波束 + 量子情報視点で再構成する道筋として刺さる ✨
scored_papers.summary: 🔄 運動学固定後の遷移行列を有限次元量子写像に reduce、回路表現で entanglement を過程レベルから扱う 🌐

scored_papers.title: Finite-time memory detectors and fully constraining Faddeev-Kulish dressings in QED and gravity
scored_papers.abstract: Finite-time Faddeev-Kulish dressings can be fully constrained by symmetry, recovering classical memory effects. Finite-time Fock spaces and memory detectors are constructed.
scored_papers.reason: ⏳ 有限時間 FK 衣 + memory detector!漸近状態を有限時間版に置換する波束-S行列議論と地続き ✨
scored_papers.summary: 🌐 対称性で衣選択を一意化、有限時間 Fock 空間で gravitational memory + Christodoulou 高次寄与を再構成 💫

scored_papers.title: Scalable Liquid-Crystal Integrated Silicon Nitride Photonic Circuits for Reconfigurable Quantum Interference
scored_papers.abstract: We demonstrate liquid-crystal integrated silicon nitride photonic circuits for low-power reconfigurable quantum interference experiments.
scored_papers.reason: 💎 LC + SiN で低消費電力な再構成可能量子干渉プラットフォーム。SPDC 干渉実験の実装側として注目 ✨
scored_papers.summary: 🔬 LC の大きな屈折率変化と SiN の低損失を組合せ、低電圧で位相変調。集積光量子回路の現実的選択肢 🎵

scored_papers.title: An Exactly Solvable Absorbing Quantum Walk
scored_papers.abstract: We solve from first principles a continuous-time quantum walk with absorption from a Lindblad boundary sink, obtaining the exact propagator and first-passage statistics.
scored_papers.reason: ⏰ 吸収境界 (Lindblad sink) 入りの量子歩行を厳密解!非エルミート吸収モデル + first-passage の良い教科書例 ✨
scored_papers.summary: 🚪 sink トレースで rank-1 純虚 defect な非エルミート tight-binding に。弱結合-強散逸両極限で挙動を解析 💫

scored_papers.title: Analytic $C_{\ell_1}$ norm of Coherence Evolution for Bell States under a Two-Qubit Superconducting Hamiltonian
scored_papers.abstract: We derive the exact analytic time evolution and C_{l1} norm of coherence for Bell states under a two-qubit superconducting Hamiltonian.
scored_papers.reason: 🎼 Bell 状態の C_{l1} コヒーレンスを解析的に完全に追跡。2 光子干渉の量子情報量化のひな型として参考 ✨
scored_papers.summary: 📐 2 つの Bell 状態は不変、残り 2 つは可調 dynamics。time-dependent density matrix の閉形式表現を提供 💫
